scripts.lint:yaml: node -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; import YAML from 'yaml'; for (const file of ['registry/projects.yaml','registry/repositories.yaml']) { YAML.parse(fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8')); console.log('YAML OK:', file); }"
scripts.check: npm run lint:md && npm run lint:yaml && npm run validate:registry && npm run validate:metadata
